package rulecoverage

func PositiveLdapInjectionViaStringConcat() string {
    ruleID := "ldap_injection_via_string_concat"
    family := "security"
    severity := "error"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "string concatenation or `fmt.Sprintf` building LDAP filter strings with user input"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
